title: create: crazier and craftier
description: a modpack to play with my friendds and others if they are intrested
body:
# create: crazier and craftier
This is a Create-focused modpack and a tech-based modpack with no other goal than to make crazier and craftier contraptions—making everything possible and more efficient. ![a tree farm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f387c9821c33f4291cdf0d6e0e54926dd8c53fc.webp)
For this purpose, we have installed tech mods of this kind, including Create and its many add-ons. We have also installed Spirit for a magical feel,![spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e22853e230da2ec9fe38bdcf1953ccb00f869b81.jpeg)
and the Origins mod for an RPG feel, along with some currency mods and various general quality-of-life mods.

Let's go exploring, creating, crafting, and more in the modpack!
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d7761b61904a6c460e3c490de43b687c662de4.jpeg)
